{% load i18n %} {% comment %} Phase 15 — Per-product SEO landing block (rendered before footer). Inputs (from view's ``product_seo_landing`` context): { "override_html": "<...>" or "", # admin override path "landing_html": "

...

...", # auto-generated theme + meta paragraphs "top_queries_items": [{"label", "url"}, ...], "category_layout": {"tab_blocks": [...], "best_prices": None, "has_any": bool}, "fit_code": "" | "oversize" | "classic" | ... } Renders only when at least one of (override_html, landing_html, top_queries_items, category_layout.has_any) is non-empty. {% endcomment %} {% if product_seo_landing %} {% with psl=product_seo_landing %} {% if psl.override_html or psl.landing_html or psl.top_queries_items or psl.category_layout.has_any %}
{# 1. Long SEO copy: admin override has priority. #} {% if psl.override_html %}
{{ psl.override_html|safe }}
{% elif psl.landing_html %}
{{ psl.landing_html|safe }}
{% endif %} {# 2. Tabbed block: top_queries (per-product) + top_filters/top_menu (from category). #} {% if psl.top_queries_items or psl.category_layout.tab_blocks %}
{% if psl.top_queries_items %} {% endif %} {% for entry in psl.category_layout.tab_blocks %} {% with block=entry.block %} {% endwith %} {% endfor %}
{# Per-product queries panel. #} {% if psl.top_queries_items %}
    {% for item in psl.top_queries_items %}
  • {{ item.label }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {# Category-level tabs (top_filters, top_menu). #} {% for entry in psl.category_layout.tab_blocks %} {% with block=entry.block items=entry.items %}
    {% for item in items %}
  • {{ item.label }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endwith %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endwith %} {% endif %}
